## Editor

- [NVlabs/AnyFlow](https://github.com/NVlabs/AnyFlow) — ⭐ 124 · `Python` · Framework — AnyFlow is an on-policy distillation (OPD) framework for any-step video diffusion, leveraging Flow Map distillation to significantly enhance the inference efficiency of video generation models by reducing the required sampling steps.
- [MarkHershey/PSIVG](https://github.com/MarkHershey/PSIVG) — ⭐ 118 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the code for a research project, presented at CVPR 2026, focusing on video generation that incorporates a physical simulator in the loop. It aims to create more realistic and physically plausible videos by integrating physics-based simulation.
- [ZheningHuang/SpaceTimePilot](https://github.com/ZheningHuang/SpaceTimePilot) — ⭐ 112 · `Python` · Paper Code — SpaceTimePilot is a research project focusing on generative rendering of dynamic scenes across space and time, utilizing a full-grid structure. This method enables the sampling of arbitrary paths through 4D space-time from a single scene, facilitating free 4D navigation and proving effective for training video models to achieve space-time disentanglement.
- [idwts/Crayotter](https://github.com/idwts/Crayotter) — ⭐ 100 · `Python` · AI Agent — Crayotter is a multimodal AI agent for autonomous video editing, composing, and production, enabling end-to-end text-to-video generation from a single text request. It leverages multimodal large language models within an agentic framework to automate the entire video creation process.
- [EvoLinkAI/GPT-Image-2-Seedance2-Workflow](https://github.com/EvoLinkAI/GPT-Image-2-Seedance2-Workflow) — ⭐ 97 · `Python` · Tutorial/Course — This repository provides workflows and prompt templates for creating high-quality AI-generated videos by leveraging GPT-Image-2 and Seedance2, focusing on practical implementation for video production.
- [dansugc/reelclaw](https://github.com/dansugc/reelclaw) — ⭐ 83 · `Python` · Self-hosted Service — ReelClaw is a UGC reel production engine that integrates with AI coding agents to create engaging, short-form videos at scale. Its purpose is to automate the generation of viral video content.
- [QuanjianSong/FashionChameleon](https://github.com/QuanjianSong/FashionChameleon) — ⭐ 74 · Paper Code — This project provides the official PyTorch code for the 'FashionChameleon' paper, which focuses on real-time and interactive customization of garments on human subjects in videos.
- [yyfz/Warp-as-History](https://github.com/yyfz/Warp-as-History) — ⭐ 74 · `Python` · Paper Code — Warp-as-History introduces a method for camera-controlled video generation, enabling interactive video creation from a single training video. It fine-tunes a general video model to follow specified camera perspectives without additional encoders, treating camera trajectory warps as 'history frames'.
- [meituan-longcat/WBench](https://github.com/meituan-longcat/WBench) — ⭐ 70 · `Python` · Paper Code — WBench is a comprehensive multi-turn benchmark designed for evaluating interactive video world models. It tests the models' ability to generate worlds that users can control, reconstruct, and reason about across four major interaction types: navigation, subject action, event editing, and perspective switching.
- [UfukNode/Noustiny](https://github.com/UfukNode/Noustiny) — ⭐ 68 · `TypeScript` · Application — Noustiny is a video creation pipeline that operates on top of Hermes Agent. It takes a story seed and automatically generates character portraits, clones voiceovers, and renders a publishable video.
- [leeyeel/Sketch2Motion](https://github.com/leeyeel/Sketch2Motion) — ⭐ 64 · `Python` · Library — This repository provides a method to convert static photos or sketches into dynamic motion videos or smooth drawing animations.
- [pixelxzen/phantom-motion](https://github.com/pixelxzen/phantom-motion) — ⭐ 58 · `HTML` · Application — Phantom Motion is an interactive dynamic visual storytelling generator that uses AI agents to create cinematic HTML5/WebGL animations from text scripts. It synchronizes audio, video, and effects, outputting 4K MP4 videos.
- [PKU-YuanGroup/OSP-Next](https://github.com/PKU-YuanGroup/OSP-Next) — ⭐ 48 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents OSP-Next, an ultra-efficient, open-source Text-to-Video (T2V) model from the Open-Sora Plan team. It leverages techniques like Skiparse-2D+SSP and HiF8 Quantization to achieve significant speed improvements on NPU and GPU hardware, surpassing other T2V models.
- [HKUST-LongGroup/SwiftI2V](https://github.com/HKUST-LongGroup/SwiftI2V) — ⭐ 29 · `HTML` · Paper Code — SwiftI2V is a project for efficient high-resolution image-to-video generation, detailed in a research paper. It employs a two-stage framework to produce crisp 2K videos by first generating a low-resolution motion map and then refining it.
- [Anil-matcha/gemini-omni-comfyui](https://github.com/Anil-matcha/gemini-omni-comfyui) — ⭐ 13 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides custom nodes for ComfyUI, enabling users to perform text-to-video, image-to-video generation, and video editing using the Google Gemini Omni API. It integrates multimodal video capabilities into the ComfyUI workflow.
- [facebookresearch/flowception](https://github.com/facebookresearch/flowception) — ⭐ 10 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the authors' implementation of Flowception, a method for video generation using temporally expansive flow matching. It enables bridging bidirectional sequence modeling and autoregressive generation to insert and denoise video frames.

## Motion Capture

- [freemocap/freemocap](https://github.com/freemocap/freemocap) — ⭐ 7,592 · `Python` · Application — FreeMoCap is a project providing free and accessible motion capture technology. It allows users to capture and analyze human movement without requiring specialized equipment.
- [xianfei/SysMocap](https://github.com/xianfei/SysMocap) — ⭐ 2,835 · `JavaScript` · Application — A real-time motion capture system that uses video input to animate 3D virtual characters and avatars. It is designed for applications like VTubing and augmented reality.
- [facebookresearch/momentum](https://github.com/facebookresearch/momentum) — ⭐ 351 · `C++` · Library — A library for human kinematic motion and numerical optimization solvers, designed to generate realistic human motion via kinematic optimization.
- [yedp123/ComfyUI-Yedp-Action-Director](https://github.com/yedp123/ComfyUI-Yedp-Action-Director) — ⭐ 333 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — This ComfyUI node acts as a 3D viewport director, allowing users to intuitively direct, preview, and batch-render 3D character animations, environments, and custom cameras from Mixamo FBX files for ControlNet workflows, supporting features like motion capture.
- [AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp](https://github.com/AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp) — ⭐ 51 · `C` · Library — This is a pure C++ runtime for real-time 3D full-body reconstruction and multi-person motion capture from a single camera. It provides a 70-joint skeleton output, including hands, in BVH format.

## Streaming

- [daya0576/nightwatcher](https://github.com/daya0576/nightwatcher) — ⭐ 266 · `Python` · Application — Nightwatcher is a web-based IP camera viewer for fast and simple streaming in any browser. It also includes capabilities for custom detection within video streams.

## Analysis

- [blakeblackshear/frigate](https://github.com/blakeblackshear/frigate) — ⭐ 32,786 · `TypeScript` · Self-hosted Service — Frigate is a Network Video Recorder (NVR) system that performs real-time local object detection on IP camera feeds. - [NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints/video-search-and-summarization](https://github.com/NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints/video-search-and-summarization) — ⭐ 1,181 · `Python` · Boilerplate/Template — This repository offers a suite of reference architectures designed for building GPU-accelerated vision agents. It enables AI-powered video analytics applications, including video search and summarization.
- [ubicomplab/rPPG-Toolbox](https://github.com/ubicomplab/rPPG-Toolbox) — ⭐ 1,051 · `Python` · Library — This deep learning toolbox is designed for remote photoplethysmography (rPPG), enabling the extraction of physiological signals like heart rate from webcam videos using computer vision techniques.
- [bradautomates/claude-video](https://github.com/bradautomates/claude-video) — ⭐ 715 · `Python` · Skill Pack — This tool gives the Claude AI agent the ability to process any video by downloading it, extracting frames, transcribing the audio, and then feeding this multimodal data to Claude for analysis.
- [joinly-ai/joinly](https://github.com/joinly-ai/joinly) — ⭐ 503 · `Python` · Application — This project enables AI agents to join and interact with online video meetings, offering features like transcription and conversational AI. It allows agents to process meeting content and assist with tasks such as generating notes.
- [theNetworkChuck/frigate-nvr-guide](https://github.com/theNetworkChuck/frigate-nvr-guide) — ⭐ 322 · Tutorial/Course — This guide provides comprehensive instructions for building a local AI surveillance system using Frigate NVR, covering setups for Raspberry Pi with Hailo, desktop with Coral, and includes configuration and troubleshooting tips.
- [spupuz/VibeNVR](https://github.com/spupuz/VibeNVR) — ⭐ 152 · `JavaScript` · Application — VibeNVR is a simple, privacy-respecting local Network Video Recorder (NVR) application. It allows users to manage security cameras, record video, perform motion detection, and utilize AI object recognition without any cloud dependencies.
- [ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills](https://github.com/ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills) — ⭐ 151 · Skill Pack — This repository provides YouTube Transcript API skills specifically for AI agents, enabling them to retrieve transcripts, search video content, and browse channels. It integrates with various agent platforms like OpenClaw and Claude Code.
- [chancharikmitra/CHAI](https://github.com/chancharikmitra/CHAI) — ⭐ 126 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the official codebase for the CVPR 2026 paper "Building a Precise Video Language with Human–AI Oversight." It introduces CHAI, a system designed to caption videos with the precision of a professional filmmaker using human-defined visual primitives.
- [maheshpaulj/Lane\_Detection](https://github.com/maheshpaulj/Lane_Detection) — ⭐ 69 · `Python` · Application — A real-time lane and car detection system that uses YOLOv8 and OpenCV for autonomous driving and traffic analysis, including distance estimation for vehicles.
- [framerslab/safeos](https://github.com/framerslab/safeos) — ⭐ 31 · `TypeScript` · Application — This is a free, privacy-first progressive web app (PWA) that utilizes on-device computer vision for real-time monitoring of pets, babies, and elderly individuals. It detects events like falls or abnormal activity, running entirely offline in the browser using TensorFlow.js.

## VFX

- [facefusion/facefusion](https://github.com/facefusion/facefusion) — ⭐ 28,439 · `Python` · Application — FaceFusion is an industry-leading platform designed for advanced face manipulation, facilitating tasks such as deepfake creation, face swapping, and lip-syncing for visual effects.
- [nikopueringer/CorridorKey](https://github.com/nikopueringer/CorridorKey) — ⭐ 13,164 · `Python` · Application — This project aims to provide highly effective green screen keying capabilities, likely for video or image post-production workflows.
- [Alchemist0823/three.quarks](https://github.com/Alchemist0823/three.quarks) — ⭐ 806 · `TypeScript` · Library — A general-purpose particle system and VFX engine built for three.js, enabling dynamic visual effects creation, with a visual editor for designing and animating particles in web environments.
- [taco-group/SparkVSR](https://github.com/taco-group/SparkVSR) — ⭐ 498 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — SparkVSR is a Python project that provides interactive video super-resolution, enhancing video quality by propagating information from sparse keyframes. It's offered as an official ComfyUI workflow.
- [Motion-Core/motion-core](https://github.com/Motion-Core/motion-core) — ⭐ 482 · `Svelte` · Library — A curated collection of high-quality Svelte components providing customizable motion and animation effects. It is designed to enhance web project visuals with unique and appealing animations, offering detailed control to developers.
- [NevermindNilas/TheAnimeScripter](https://github.com/NevermindNilas/TheAnimeScripter) — ⭐ 277 · `Python` · Application — This is a high-performance tool for enhancing videos, offering features like resolution upscaling, motion interpolation, and depth estimation. It's designed for video processing, particularly anime, and functions as both a CLI and an Adobe After Effects extension.
- [Chinna95P/mpv-anime-build](https://github.com/Chinna95P/mpv-anime-build) — ⭐ 118 · `GLSL` · Plugin/Extension — This is an MPV media player configuration that automatically detects video content (anime/live-action) and applies AI-powered upscaling and processing pipelines using shaders like Anime4K, FSRCNNX, and NNEDI. It aims to enhance video quality and provides a clean On-Screen Display.
- [Deno2026/comfyui-deno-custom-nodes](https://github.com/Deno2026/comfyui-deno-custom-nodes) — ⭐ 34 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — This repository contains a collection of custom nodes and utility tools designed for ComfyUI, enhancing its capabilities for visual content processing. It includes features for RTX Video Super Resolution, NVIDIA VFX integration, image/video comparison, video format conversion (e.g., to GIF/WebP), and various workflow helpers.

## Avatar/Talking Head

- [OpenTalker/SadTalker](https://github.com/OpenTalker/SadTalker) — ⭐ 13,840 · `Python` · Application — This project generates realistic talking head videos from a single input image and an audio clip, animating the face to synchronize with the speech. It focuses on learning 3D motion coefficients for stylized audio-driven animation.
- [duixcom/Duix-Avatar](https://github.com/duixcom/Duix-Avatar) — ⭐ 13,415 · `C` · Application — This is an open-source AI avatar toolkit designed for creating digital humans and generating videos offline. It enables users to clone digital humans and produce various video content directly on their local machines.
- [duixcom/Duix-Mobile](https://github.com/duixcom/Duix-Mobile) — ⭐ 7,994 · `C++` · Application — Duix-Mobile offers a real-time interactive AI avatar (digital human) solution designed for on-premise deployment with sub-1.5 second latency. It enables users to experience and interact with pre-trained digital human models, particularly optimized for mobile devices.
- [kijai/ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper) — ⭐ 6,453 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides the Wan Video Wrapper for ComfyUI, adding support for advanced video functionalities like LongCatAvatar 1.5. It serves as an extension to enhance ComfyUI's video processing capabilities.
- [meituan-longcat/LongCat-Video](https://github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-Video) — ⭐ 2,509 · `Python` · Framework — An open-source framework designed for generating realistic digital human avatars from audio input. It features an upgraded audio encoder (Whisper-Large) for smoother, more natural lip dynamics, aimed at production-ready stability.
- [met4citizen/TalkingHead](https://github.com/met4citizen/TalkingHead) — ⭐ 1,223 · `JavaScript` · Library — This repository provides a JavaScript class for real-time lip-sync functionality, enabling full-body 3D avatars to animate their mouths according to speech. It's designed for creating interactive talking 3D characters for web applications.
- [uezo/ChatdollKit](https://github.com/uezo/ChatdollKit) — ⭐ 1,158 · `C#` · Framework — ChatdollKit is a framework that allows users to transform their 3D models into interactive, voice-enabled chatbots or virtual assistants. It integrates with Unity for 3D rendering and utilizes AI, such as ChatGPT, for conversational capabilities.
- [warmshao/FasterLivePortrait](https://github.com/warmshao/FasterLivePortrait) — ⭐ 1,109 · `Python` · Application — FasterLivePortrait is a project that brings still portraits to life in real-time through animation, with support for ONNX and TensorRT for optimized performance. It focuses on driving dynamic motion in static images.
- [GAIR-NLP/LiveTalk](https://github.com/GAIR-NLP/LiveTalk) — ⭐ 292 · `Python` · Application — A tool for generating interactive talking avatars with significant speed improvements in creation. It is designed for producing dynamic visual and audio presentations.
- [Azure-Samples/voicelive-api-salescoach](https://github.com/Azure-Samples/voicelive-api-salescoach) — ⭐ 133 · `Python` · Application — A demo application for an AI sales coach that simulates sales calls using Azure AI avatars and the Azure Voice Live API.
- [PunithVT/ai-avatar-system](https://github.com/PunithVT/ai-avatar-system) — ⭐ 45 · `Python` · Application — This open-source AI platform enables real-time talking avatars by allowing users to upload a photo and clone a voice to animate any face with lip-sync. It supports WebSocket streaming and integrates with services like Claude, Whisper, and MuseTalk for generative AI capabilities.
- [avaturn-live/avtr-1](https://github.com/avaturn-live/avtr-1) — ⭐ 36 · `Python` · Paper Code — AVTR-1 is a system or model designed to create interactive avatars that can respond or 'listen back'. It aims to make digital avatars more engaging and lifelike.
- [kaist-ami/ELITE](https://github.com/kaist-ami/ELITE) — ⭐ 34 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the official code for ELITE, a research project focusing on efficient generation of high-fidelity 3D head avatars from a single monocular video.

## Other

- [yt-dlp/yt-dlp](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp) — ⭐ 164,548 · `Python` · CLI Tool — yt-dlp is a powerful, feature-rich command-line tool for downloading audio and video content. It supports a wide range of platforms, including YouTube, X, TikTok, and Instagram.
- [CapSoftware/Cap](https://github.com/CapSoftware/Cap) — ⭐ 18,508 · `TypeScript` · Application — Cap is an open-source alternative to Loom, providing a user-friendly application for creating beautiful and easily shareable screen recordings by capturing video content directly from your computer screen.
- [krillinai/KrillinAI](https://github.com/krillinai/KrillinAI) — ⭐ 10,006 · `Go` · Application — KrillinAI is an AI-powered video translation and dubbing tool that supports 100 languages. It offers one-click full-process deployment and optimizes video output for platforms like YouTube and TikTok.
- [caorushizi/mediago](https://github.com/caorushizi/mediago) — ⭐ 8,882 · `TypeScript` · Application — MediaGo is a cross-platform video downloader that can sniff and grab streams from various online platforms, including YouTube, Bilibili, and HLS/m3u8 sources. It provides an easy way to download and manage online video content for offline access.
- [thorvg/thorvg](https://github.com/thorvg/thorvg) — ⭐ 1,597 · `C++` · Library — This is a high-performance C++ vector graphics engine that can render SVG and Lottie animations, using advanced backends like WebGPU. It serves as a core rendering solution for various graphic formats.
- [LottieFiles/dotlottie-web](https://github.com/LottieFiles/dotlottie-web) — ⭐ 722 · `TypeScript` · Library — This is an official LottieFiles player for rendering Lottie and dotLottie animations on the web, supporting various frontend frameworks and web components. It's used to display motion graphics within web environments.
- [LottieFiles/dotlottie-ios](https://github.com/LottieFiles/dotlottie-ios) — ⭐ 138 · `C` · Library — This is an iOS player for rendering Lottie and dotLottie animations on iOS devices.
- [LottieFiles/dotlottie-android](https://github.com/LottieFiles/dotlottie-android) — ⭐ 126 · `Kotlin` · Library — This is an Android player for rendering Lottie and dotLottie animations on Android devices.
- [feicaiclub/video-spec-builder](https://github.com/feicaiclub/video-spec-builder) — ⭐ 89 · `JavaScript` · Skill Pack — This tool, video-spec-builder, converts a video concept into a second-by-second storyboard script (video-spec.md) for rendering with HyperFrames. It's designed to be installed as a skill for Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex.
- [AgriciDaniel/claude-youtube](https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-youtube) — ⭐ 84 · `Python` · Skill Pack — This project provides a Claude Code skill for YouTube creators, offering capabilities like channel audits, video SEO, retention script generation, and thumbnail creation. It helps optimize content strategy and overall YouTube presence.
- [vfarcic/youtube-automation](https://github.com/vfarcic/youtube-automation) — ⭐ 34 · `Go` · Application — This repository appears to be a Go-based tool for automating various tasks related to YouTube. While specific details are scarce, its name suggests functionality for content automation within the YouTube platform.
- [nandieling/OmniPlay](https://github.com/nandieling/OmniPlay) — ⭐ 31 · `Swift` · Application — A video player for macOS and Windows that scans local or network video resources, organizing them into a poster wall with TMDB data and supporting searching and sorting.
